title: Wave 18 - Manager auth hardening and property form parity
description: Coordinate Wave 18 to harden manager auth/session behavior and deliver native create/edit property form flows aligned with CRM contracts.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 18 tickets are defined for architect/backend/mobile/qa with dependency order
Execution plan includes PR/Jira traceability and rollback checkpoints for auth and property form mutations
Risk log covers session drift, validation mismatch, and stale list synchronization
